title: Send 1 Email Notification By Group

posts.author: MichelleGugg (MichelleGugg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can we just have 1 email notification sent if there are items that remain in existence in a group because their status is open?

Or rather, send one email to a person who has multiple tasks with status “opened” . I dont want 3 emails sent if 3 tasks are open to a person. I just want 1 email sent to the person saying you have 3 tasks open.

What are you trying to achieve

email notification of consolidated information
